title: dcg-vy2.3
description: After dcg-vy2.1 (code fix) and dcg-vy2.2 (doc reconciliation) are done, re-run plan completion signoff on all docs that were Partial. Update their Completion Signoff sections to Status: Complete. Run the signoff-status.py script to confirm all docs are Complete.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: All 20 plan docs at Status: Complete (100%). Verified via signoff-status.py.
